title: NIO Reaffirms Q4 Profit Target, Three Flagship Large EVs Set for 2026
text: NIO achieved gross margin of 13.6% for full year 2025, compared with 9.9% for previous year. Company achieved gross margin of 17.5% in Q4 2025 with non-GAAP operating profit of RMB 1,251.3 million quarterly for first time, marking major profitability milestone. NIO's comprehensive gross profit margin expected reach over 20% in 2026 with sales volume growth driving continuous cost reduction in supply chain and continuous optimization of cost control. Management entering 'healthy business cycle', forecasting non-GAAP operating profit break-even in fiscal 2026. NIO set ambitious target of 40%-50% volume growth in 2026 with deliveries expected closer to half million vehicles. Company reported first-ever quarterly net profit March 10, 2026 with unaudited Q4 2025 non-GAAP net income approximately $104 million alongside record deliveries 124,807 vehicles. Company launching two new models in Q2 2026 and another in Q3, all large vehicles expected have higher margins supporting volume growth targets.
